_comment: PanPilot custom foods (spec §2.7). Copy to the device filesystem as /foods.json (pio run -t uploadfs, or via the web UI later). Each entry either ADDS a new food or, when name+variant match a seed entry, OVERRIDES it. Temperatures are °F pan-surface; times are seconds authored at refF. safeInternalF is a USDA minimum and forces the verify-internal-temp note — never zero it to reduce UI noise.

foods.name: My smash burger
foods.flip: Scrape-flip hard once the crust is deep brown

foods.name: Pancakes
foods.flip: My griddle runs cool - wait for the bubbles
